signals.name: C04 Three-feature minimal regime signal
signals.rule: 0% TQQQ when QQQ close < QQQ 200-day SMA AND QQQ 200-day SMA slope < 0; 50% TQQQ when QQQ realized volatility 20-day > realized volatility 60-day while long trend remains positive; return to 100% only when QQQ close > QQQ 200-day SMA AND QQQ 200-day SMA slope > 0 AND QQQ realized volatility 20-day <= realized volatility 60-day
